name: workstation-autopilot
description: Keep a Mac fast and files tidy, and track where you're exposed online. mac-tuneup reports resource hogs and safely auto-cleans an allowlist; file-organizer auto-sorts Downloads & Desktop by type with full undo; footprint-audit reports your data-broker, search-engine, and breach exposure; footprint-digest re-scans on a schedule and flags what came back. Safe-by-default, reversible, report-first.
